message:
🌱 istio: Multi-Cluster/Multi-Network - Cannot use a hostname-based gateway for east-west (#1040)

* 🌱 Add istio: Multi-Cluster/Multi-Network - Cannot use a hostname-based mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: change istio#29359 type from feature to bug, add PR istio/istio#36422

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "istio-29359-multi-cluster-multi-network-cannot-use-a-hostname-based-gateway-for-",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "istio: Multi-Cluster/Multi-Network - Cannot use a hostname-based gateway for east-west traffic",
+    "description": "Multi-Cluster/Multi-Network - Cannot use a hostname-based gateway for east-west traffic. Requested by 20+ users.",
+    "type": "bug",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current istio deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your istio version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n istio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nhelm list -n istio 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working istio installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review istio configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant istio configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n istio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nkubectl get configmap -n istio -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=istio\n```\n**Bug description**\n\nFollowing the guide [Install Multi-Primary on different networks](https://istio.io/latest/docs/setup/install/multicluster/multi-primary_multi-network), everything seems to install as expected without errors and is running in the"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Multi-Cluster/Multi-Network - Cannot use a hostname-based\u2026",
+        "description": "Hi  \n\nThis looks as though your clusters are not properly configured for endpoint discovery. This requires both eastwest gateway and as well the secrets to be properly configured.\n\nTo verify secrets, check if you have the kubeconfigs located in the `istio-system` namespace for both clusters. And\n```yaml\n# From Cluster 1 [where helloworld v1 is deployed]\n$ while true; do kubectl exec --context=\"${CTX_CLUSTER1}\" -n sample -c sleep     \"$(kubectl get pod --context=\"${CTX_CLUSTER1}\" -n sample -l \\\n    app=sleep -o jsonpath='{.items[0].metadata.name}')\"     -- curl -s helloworld.sample:5000/hello; done\nHello version: v1, instance: helloworld-v1-578dd69f69-r9lkz\nHello version: v1, instance: helloworld-v1-578dd69f69-r9lkz\nHello version: v1, instance: helloworld-v1-578dd69f69-r9lkz\nHello version: v1, instance: helloworld-v1-578dd69f69-r9lkz\nHello version: v1, instance: helloworld-v1-578dd69f69-r9lkz\n\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n istio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nkubectl get events -n istio --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Multi-Cluster/Multi-Network - Cannot use a hostname-based\u2026\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Hi  \n\nThis looks as though your clusters are not properly configured for endpoint discovery. This requires both eastwest gateway and as well the secrets to be properly configured.\n\nTo verify secrets, check if you have the kubeconfigs located in the `istio-system` namespace for both clusters.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "# From Cluster 1 [where helloworld v1 is deployed]\n$ while true; do kubectl exec --context=\"${CTX_CLUSTER1}\" -n sample -c sleep     \"$(kubectl get pod --context=\"${CTX_CLUSTER1}\" -n sample -l \\\n    app=sleep -o jsonpath='{.items[0].metadata.name}')\"     -- curl -s helloworld.sample:5000/hello; done\nHello version: v1, instance: helloworld-v1-578dd69f69-r9lkz\nHello version: v1, instance: helloworld-v1-578dd69f69-r9lkz\nHello version: v1, instance: helloworld-v1-578dd69f69-r9lkz\nHello version: v1, instance: helloworld-v1-578dd69f69-r9lkz\nHello version: v1, instance: helloworld-v1-578dd69f69-r9lkz\n...\n# From Cluster 2 [where helloworld v2 is deployed]\n$ while true; do kubectl exec --context=\"${CTX_CLUSTER2}\" -n sample -c sleep     \"$(kubectl get pod --context=\"${CTX_CLUSTER2}\" -n sample -l \\\n  ",
+        "# Cluster 1\n$ istioctl -n sample --context=${CTX_CLUSTER1} proxy-config endpoint \"$(kubectl get pod --context=\"${CTX_CLUSTER1}\" -n sample -l app=sleep -o jsonpath='{.items[0].metadata.name}')\" | grep helloworld\n10.100.1.12:5000                 HEALTHY     OK                outbound|5000||helloworld.sample.svc.cluster.local\n\n# Cluster 2\n$ istioctl -n sample --context=${CTX_CLUSTER2} proxy-config endpoint \"$(kubectl get pod --context=\"${CTX_CLUSTER2}\" -n sample -l app=sleep -o jsonpath='{.items[0].metadata.name}')\" | grep helloworld\n10.100.2.188:5000                HEALTHY     OK                outbound|5000||helloworld.sample.svc.cluster.local",
+        "$ istioctl version\nclient version: 1.8.0\ncontrol plane version: 1.8.0\ndata plane version: 1.8.0 (4 proxies)\n\n$ kubectl version\nClient Version: version.Info{Major:\"1\", Minor:\"19\", GitVersion:\"v1.19.4\", GitCommit:\"d360454c9bcd1634cf4cc52d1867af5491dc9c5f\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", BuildDate:\"2020-11-12T01:09:16Z\", GoVersion:\"go1.15.4\", Compiler:\"gc\", Platform:\"darwin/amd64\"}\nServer Version: version.Info{Major:\"1\", Minor:\"17+\", GitVersion:\"v1.17.12-eks-7684af\", GitCommit:\"7684af4ac41370dd109ac13817023cb8063e3d45\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", BuildDate:\"2020-10-20T22:57:40Z\", GoVersion:\"go1.13.15\", Compiler:\"gc\", Platform:\"linux/amd64\"}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
